name: Terrific Broth (TB)

components.name: Add 100 mL phosphate buffer (0.17M KH₂PO₄ + 0.72M K₂HPO₄)

notes.en: 2-3× higher density than LB. Glycerol = carbon source; phosphate prevents pH drop. Ideal for recombinant protein. Autoclave phosphate separately!
notes.zh: 密度比 LB 高 2-3 倍。甘油提供碳源；磷酸盐防止 pH 下降。适合重组蛋白表达。磷酸盐须单独灭菌！

ref: Tartof & Hobbs (1987) Bethesda Res Lab Focus 9:12

storage.notes: Autoclave salts and glycerol separately; mix after cooling

usage.en: Terrific broth for high-density E. coli culture in recombinant protein expression.
usage.zh: Terrific Broth 培养基，用于重组蛋白表达时的高密度大肠杆菌培养。

prepSteps.step: Dissolve tryptone (12 g), yeast extract (24 g), and glycerol (4 mL) in ~800 mL ddH₂O.
Separately prepare 10× phosphate buffer: KH₂PO₄ (2.31 g) and K₂HPO₄ (12.54 g) in 100 mL ddH₂O; autoclave separately.
Autoclave base medium at 121°C for 20 min.
Cool to <55°C and add 100 mL sterile 10× phosphate buffer.
